title: chrysosplenium crenulatum var. microphyllum
intro: Chrysosplenium crenulatum var. microphyllum, also known as dwarf golden saxifrage, is a variety of flowering plant in the saxifrage family that is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium crenulatum var. microphyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
